what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-001: Bulk Upload & Data Import Validation Gaps
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Bulk upload template does not support job type/employment type; lacks comprehensive validation during Excel uploads.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Split button shows Excel bulk import option. Template limitations inherent to design.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: EOS framework gaps: cannot self-service reopen finalized settlements; strict date validation; gratuity fields non-editable when zero.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: EOS accessed via employee Payroll tab only. Not available as standalone section in Payroll sidebar.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Custom permissions lack granular control; no field-level access restrictions.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Settings > Company shows Employee Permissions as section-level configuration.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Profile completion percentage visible but may not reflect all required fields accurately.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Completion percentages range 14%-98%. Multiple employees with low completion have missing IDs and titles.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: File size/format limitations; bulk document operations restricted.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: My Documents shows format/sizing info. Upload area accepts drag-and-drop with restrictions.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-014: Employee Record Integrity & Status Validation
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Data consistency issues on status changes: leave records not displayed after policy unassignment; work email changeable for registered users.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Could not reproduce in demo environment. Requires specific test scenarios with policy changes and offboarding.

summary: Records Management validation completed with 39 screenshots across all major feature areas. All 12 employee profile tabs visited and documented. CRUD operations validated: Create (Add Employee form with validation), Read (full profile with all tabs), Update (edit form on Personal section), Delete (not available from list - by design). Workflow integration confirmed with 6 employee-related triggers. 46+ approval flow types documented. 3 high-impact WOF items validated: 2 confirmed, 1 not reproducible. Employee list supports 3 view modes, download export, column customization, search/filter, and pagination across 124 employees.
